sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77399" key="paneu/frwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰν-εύφρων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (εὐφρόνἠ</foreign> <sense id="n77399.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πάννυχος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:435" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">435</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
